transcript: This is the first time I'm doing this video in a long time, so I hope you enjoy it as much as I did in the last video. I'm going to do a lot of things today, so I'm going to do a lot of things. I know them, know them, know you, know me, know you Tell me you want me here one day And I'll be here today Ready to take place Ready to give you what you've been missing all these days What you've been waiting for, it's not your fault I know what you want I ask myself if this is real I contemplate about how I feel But you make it way too hard to feel That this should be what you're looking It took a lot of hard shit to learn how not to break down and stop it No matter what I've seen in the past
